title: Dimensions for Ecospherical Expansion Mod
description: Adds a dimension for each world preset in the Ecospherical Expansion Mod
body:
This datapack adds a custom dimension for each of the world presets in Apothicon02's Ecospherical Expansion Mod.

 

Disclaimer: 

This does not include the OG Stratospherical preset as for some reason it would not work.

 

Credit:

All credit for the actual generation goes to "Apothicon02",

I simply converted their work into dimensions.
